Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Ezequel Cesares.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alan Townsend is present.
Attorney Marepresenting the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-21-2012 is vacated. (D501)
